mapper.select: SELECT e.ID , e.USER_ID , e.WS_ID , e.TITLE , e.DESC , e.START_DT , e.END_DT , e.IS_ALL_DAY , e.LOCATION , e.COLOR , e.REGIST_DT , e.UPDT_DT , a.EVENT_ID AS ATTENDEE_EVENT_ID , a.USER_ID AS ATTENDEE_USER_ID , a.STATUS FROM CALENDAR_EVENTS e LEFT JOIN EVENT_ATTENDEES a ON e.ID = a.EVENT_ID WHERE e.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENT_ATTENDEES (EVENT_ID, USER_ID, STATUS) VALUES (#{eventId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
